quotes: Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.
Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly.
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.

rules.intent: Maintain email layout integrity and responsive collapse on mobile devices.
rules.rule_text: The email canvas width must be a fixed and centered 600px (dimension.canvas.width = "600px"). At the mobile breakpoint of 480px (breakpoint.grid.mobile = "480px"), multi-column layouts must collapse to a single column.

quotes: Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.
**Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections — this is what makes assembly seamless).
**Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px** (each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking).
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.

rules.intent: Maintain spatial rhythm and strict structural alignment during section modular assembly.
rules.rule_text: Sections must have consistent side padding of 24px (padding.section.side = "24px") and vertical internal padding of 32px (padding.section.vertical = "32px"). All vertical layout spacers must align with the 8px base rhythm (spacing.grid.base_unit = "8px"): gaps are 16px for headings and paragraphs (margin.flow.heading_to_body = "16px"), 24px from body to CTAs (margin.flow.body_to_cta = "24px"), and 8px from image to caption (margin.flow.image_to_caption = "8px").

quotes: corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic).

Buttons/CTA **[GENERAL, contrast-checked to palette]:** Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic). Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics.

rules.intent: Maintain visual button alignment and meet touch target accessibility criteria.
rules.rule_text: CTA buttons must utilize the standard 24px pill radius (radius.cta.standard_button = "24px") and enforce a minimum touch target height of 48px (dimension.accessibility.touch_target_min = "48px") for accessibility. Colorways are mapped to Brand Blue (#00529b) for primary and a blue border outline for secondary CTAs.

quotes: One primary CTA per section maximum.
One primary CTA per section maximum.

rules.intent: Keep sections focused on single conversion objectives and avoid layout clutter.
rules.rule_text: There must be a maximum of one primary CTA button per individual layout section.
